title: WemmbuShots
description: This is a plugin that adds Wemmbu's Iconic Nuke Shot and Stab shot to your server.
body:
WemmbuShots adds two powerful and destructive fishing rod abilities to your server.
☢ Nuke Shot — Cast the rod and wherever the hook lands, a massive 25-block nuclear explosion erupts, obliterating everything in a giant sphere down to bedrock. Nearby entities are blasted away, blinded, and slowed. Not for the faint of heart.
⚫ Stab Shot — Cast the rod and wherever the hook lands, a 5×5 shaft is instantly bored straight down to bedrock, swallowing anything in its path.
Both shots require permissions to use (nukeshot.use and stabshot.use), defaulting to OPs only. Hand them out carefully.
